name: akm_list_leads
description: List leads from AKM CRM with optional filters.
description_for_agent: List leads from AKM Advisor CRM. Parameters: status (string, optional — filter by pipeline status/stage), search (string, optional — search by name/email/phone), limit (integer, optional, default 50), page (integer, optional, default 1). Returns leads with contact info, status, source, and assigned user.
